compatibilityProfile.label: Independent simulator policy; trial parity unverified
compatibilityProfile.name: public-docs-subset

simulatorPolicies: Public-documentation compatibility subset; exact tenant metadata and privileges require later trial verification.
Money is represented as canonical decimal strings and rounded half away from zero to each field scale.
No SLA KPI, inventory, payment processing, schedule board, BPF, competitor, territory, warehouse, or GPS behavior is claimed.
Closed sales records and terminal field service records are read-only except through explicit reopen actions.
